name: Mexican Wedding Cookies/Emeril
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 375°F. In a mixer, cream together the butter, salt, vanilla, and 3 tablespoons powdered sugar until smooth and fluffy. Add the flour and pecans, and mix for 1 minute. Form small balls (about 3/4-inch to 1-inch) of dough. Place them 1 inch apart on an ungreased baking sheet. Bake for 15 minutes or until lightly browned. While the cookies are still warm, roll them in the remaining powdered sugar. Cool completely before storing in an airtight container. It is traditional to wrap these rich cookies in colored tissue paper with fringed edges. This recipe yields approximately 2 dozen cookies.
